scripts.start: pkill -f ollama || true && sleep 1 && OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE=-1 OLLAMA_MAX_LOADED_MODELS=1 OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL=4 OLLAMA_MAX_QUEUE=1024 ollama serve 2>&1 & sleep 3 && ollama run gemma3:12b-it-qat
scripts.logs: echo 'Ollama logs are not available when running from CLI. Check system logs or ollama output.'
scripts.status: pgrep -f ollama > /dev/null && echo 'Ollama is running' || echo 'Ollama is not running'
